comment_create.description: User creates a new comment on an object. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

comment_edit.description: User edits their own comment. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

comment_delete.description: User deletes their own comment. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

comment_react.trigger: POST /api/comments/[id]/reactions, DELETE /api/comments/[id]/reactions, MCP add_comment_reaction, or MCP remove_comment_reaction
comment_react.description: User adds or removes a reaction on an active visible comment. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

description_edit.description: User updates an object description (content changed).

upload_delete.description: User deletes an upload they own. MCP-originated writes include metadata.source=mcp.

admin_comment_moderate.description: Admin hides or moderates a comment.

admin_description_moderate.description: Admin updates description content from the moderation workflow.

writer: writeAuditLog in src/lib/audit/write-audit-log.ts writes a record and records bounded production-safe audit write metrics by action, status, and duration. fireAuditLog wraps writeAuditLog for non-critical audit trails, logs write failures, and keeps those failures from blocking the main request.
